The '''Reidi Artom I system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] within [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

{{System-stub}}

==History==
The Reidi Artom I system was the first system discovered by [[Reidi Artom]] and was named after [[Gender/Legends|her]]. Systems she discovered later were named in similar fashion (Reidi Artom [[Reidi Artom II system|II]], [[Reidi Artom III system|III]], [[Reidi Artom IV system|IV]], [[Reidi Artom V system|V]], and [[Cularin system/Legends|VI]]). Most of these systems were eventually renamed with local or ancient names, but the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Artom]] retained its discoverer's name. The discovery of this system was not particularly profitable for its discoverer.<ref name="LFC" />
